text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Frohes neues Jahr! Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please accept this gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Puzzled, I open the box she hands me, only to be
even more confused.
choice_data_list: Sorry, what is this pink ball with eyes?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a Glücksschwein—a confection in the shape of
a pig.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It means "pig of good fortune." Think of it as a
gift to celebrate the coming year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To say this year is the most important year of my
life is no exaggeration.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To walk the proper path to success, I must enter
and win the Classic Triple Crown races—the
Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My desire to complete this difficult journey and
break through the other side has been channeled
into this Glücksschwein.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is made of marzipan, so you can eat it once you
are finished displaying it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Of course. I referenced illustrations to sculpt it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that was what I did for the beta version
before this one. Allow me to amend my
statement. Falcon also contributed to the
creation of this pig.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. For my first version, I collated
photographs to create a 360-degree-view of a
pig to ensure the most realistic results...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But Falcon said that a hyperrealistic marzipan pig
would be terrifying and advised me to use a cuter
design.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I have almost no experience with
creating stylized designs...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I tried my best... but I don't think it turned out all
that well.
choice_data_list: ...I knew it was a pig right away!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Really? That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I don't have anything to give
Eishin Flash in return. Just as I'm trying to think of
what I should do to thank her...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is merely a token of my feelings, so there is
no need to give me anything in return. But if I had
to ask for something...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to know if Japan has any New Year's
customs similar to Glücksschwein so I can partake
in them for a successful year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pretty much all New Year's traditions are meant
to bring good luck in the coming year, but the
most relevant one right now would be...
choice_data_list: Eating New Year's food for health!
Doing calligraphy to declare your resolution!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flying kites can have a lot of meanings, but I
explain that flying one high into the sky
symbolizes wishing for healthy growth in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Interesting... I'll give it a try right now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah... Look! The kite is rising!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching her run back and forth with her eyes on
the kite makes me feel warm inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how different New Year's dishes have
different meanings, and that people eat them for
good health over the next year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had heard of New Year's dishes, but I didn't
know that about them. Please tell me more.

text_block_list.name: Traditional Japanese Restaurant Staff
text_block_list.text:
I proudly present our signature New Year's
spread.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wow... There are so many small dishes packed
together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What a cute arrangement! Beautiful, I should say!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are alight with fascination as she looks
at the food. The dishes seem to strike a chord
with her, and she happily listens to the server
explain each one in detail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that writing out her true feelings on
paper will help bolster her resolution toward
reaching her goals.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So there is a ritualistic aspect to it as well. In
which case, I shall try my hand at it with the
utmost sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm finished.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please look at the four kanji I wrote.
choice_data_list:
They're beautiful! What inspired you to write
these?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship rendered them from my name. The first
two is read as "eishin," and the third and fourth
mean "flash" and "shine."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Together, they mean, "an intense light, suddenly
rising"... The wonderful imagery left quite an
impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer. Here's to our
continued cooperation.
